mapper.insert: INSERT INTO analysis_task (task_id, bvid, user_id, status, progress, current_step, error_message, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{bvid}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{currentStep}, #{errorMessage}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT task_id AS taskId, bvid, user_id AS userId, status, progress, current_step AS currentStep, error_message AS errorMessage, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM analysis_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId}

SELECT task_id AS taskId, bvid, user_id AS userId, status, progress, current_step AS currentStep, error_message AS errorMessage, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM analysis_task WHERE bvid = #{bvid} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE analysis_task SET status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE analysis_task SET progress = #{progress}, current_step = #{currentStep}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT task_id AS taskId, bvid, user_id AS userId, project_id AS projectId, status, progress, current_step AS currentStep, error_message AS errorMessage, created_at AS createdAt FROM analysis_task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE analysis_task SET status = 'FAILED', error_message = 'Task timeout', updated_at = NOW() WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'RUNNING') AND created_at < #{timeoutThreshold}
